caption: A group of people wearing hairnets and gloves are engaged in the traditional Korean communal kimchi-making process known as Kimjang.
A person wearing black gloves is holding a piece of seasoned napa cabbage over a bowl filled with similar seasoned cabbage, indicating the preparation of kimchi.

A group of individuals dressed in traditional Korean attire, including white tops and black skirts, are waving small South Korean flags during an event celebrating the 104th anniversary of the independence movement.

The image depicts a group of individuals dressed in traditional and modern attire, with some holding documents and others wearing goggles, set against a backdrop featuring the Taegeukgi, the national flag of South Korea.

A woman is adorned in a vibrant red Jeontonghonrye, a traditional Korean wedding attire, featuring intricate floral embroidery and a decorative headpiece, standing in a room with wooden beams and a window revealing an outdoor scene.
A couple dressed in traditional Korean hanbok is seated at a ritual table adorned with various offerings during a Jeontonghonrye ceremony.

The image depicts a traditional Korean ancestral rite setting, known as Jesa, featuring a ritual table adorned with various food offerings such as fruits, pastries, and rice cakes, all meticulously arranged on red stands.
A group of people dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are gathered around a ritual table for an ancestral rite, performing deep bows as part of the ceremony.
A group of individuals is standing in a line on a paved area, facing forward, with their hands clasped together in front of them, possibly participating in a solemn ceremony or remembrance event.
A group of men dressed in formal attire are gathered at a Korean grave site, engaging in a traditional Seongmyo ritual, which involves offering food and bowing in respect.
The image depicts the Cheomseongdae observatory at night, illuminated with a pinkish hue, showcasing its distinctive stacked-stone structure and square top frame.
The image depicts the Cheomseongdae observatory, a historical stone structure with a cylindrical body and a square top frame, situated in an open field under a clear sky.
The illuminated Gyeongbokgung palace stands majestically against the twilight sky, its traditional architecture highlighted by the warm glow of lights.
The image depicts the Gyeongbokgung Palace, a traditional Korean royal palace known for its wooden pavilions with upturned eaves and colorful dancheong paintwork, situated on a raised stone platform.

The image depicts a serene urban stream known as Cheonggyecheon, characterized by its shallow waterway bordered by stone embankments and surrounded by lush greenery, with pedestrians walking along the adjacent pathways.
The image depicts a statue of Admiral Yi Sun-shin, a Korean naval hero, standing tall amidst a modern urban setting with fountains and trees lining the pathway.
Jeol and Sebae are performing a traditional Korean formal deep bow, characterized by kneeling and bowing deeply with hands on the floor, often wearing hanbok.
A family is gathered in a living room, with two children performing a Jeol and Sebae, a traditional Korean bow, while an adult watches and another sits nearby.
A group of people dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are gathered in a living room, engaging in a Jeol and Sebae ritual, where they kneel and bow deeply with hands on the floor.
A group of individuals stands in front of a statue of Sejongdaewang, wearing white uniforms and black skirts, with a large golden globe sculpture between them.
A statue of Sejongdaewang, King Sejong the Great, is illuminated at night in front of a South Korean flag and a modern building.
A person is flying a colorful kite in an open grassy area under a partly cloudy sky.
A person is flying a rainbow-colored kite in a park under a clear sky.
A group of elderly individuals is gathered around a colorful floral rug, engaged in a traditional Korean board game known as Yutnori.
A boy and girl dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are sitting cross-legged on the floor, playing a game involving wooden sticks, likely Yutnori, as they toss the sticks into the air.
A group of women dressed in traditional Korean attire perform the Ganggangsullae dance on a wooden platform near a body of water with a bridge in the background.
A group of women dressed in traditional Korean hanbok are performing the Ganggangsullae dance on a stage under a full moon.

A performer in traditional Korean attire, including a yellow top with a purple sash and a blue skirt, is engaged in a mask dance known as Talchum, characterized by their exaggerated painted mask and loose colorful robes.
The image displays an array of colorful wooden masks with various facial expressions, hanging on a grid display, showcasing the vibrant and diverse nature of traditional Korean mask art.
A bowl of ramyeon with yellow curly noodles in an orange-red broth sits on a wooden table, accompanied by chopsticks resting on the rim of the bowl.
A pot of ramyeon sits next to a container of kimchi on a white surface.
A box contains neatly arranged gimbap rolls with visible ingredients such as cucumber, carrots, and sesame seeds.
The image displays a plate of pan-fried battered meatballs, known as Wanja-jeon, which are small round golden-brown patties coated with an egg batter.
The image showcases an assortment of colorful Hangwa, traditional Korean confections, each adorned with small decorative pieces and pressed floral or geometric patterns.
A box filled with various types of Hangwa, traditional Korean confections, showcasing an array of colors and textures.
A bowl of yaksik, a traditional Korean sweet rice dish, sits on a checkered cloth atop a bamboo mat, accompanied by a glass of milk and a bottle of condiment in the background.
The image displays a plate of yakgwa, small, flower-shaped or round pastries with a dark golden-brown glossy glaze, garnished with green leaves and small yellow flowers.
The image depicts a traditional Korean dish known as Bulgogi, featuring thinly sliced marinated beef with a glossy dark-brown glaze, served in a large, round pan on a stovetop.
A bowl of tteokguk, a traditional Korean dish, featuring white oval sliced rice cakes and crescent-shaped dumplings, garnished with green onions, red chili peppers, and a sprinkle of seaweed.

The image depicts a bowl of Tteokguk and Mandu soup, featuring a clear broth with white oval sliced rice cakes and crescent-shaped dumplings, garnished with a sprig of seaweed and a slice of green onion.
A plate of Japchae, featuring translucent brown noodles mixed with colorful julienned vegetables and topped with sesame seeds, is presented on a white rectangular plate.
The image depicts a traditional Korean building with a tiled roof and ornate decorations, situated atop a stone wall, under a clear blue sky.
The image depicts a serene view of a traditional Korean courtyard surrounded by stone walls topped with black tiled roofs, with trees and a clear blue sky in the background.
The image depicts the Paldalmun Gate, a gate of the Hwaseong Fortress, characterized by its arched stone gateway topped with a wooden pavilion and flanked by curved fortress walls.
The image depicts a modern architectural structure resembling an observation tower, set against a backdrop of lush green hills under an overcast sky.
The image depicts a group of soldiers gathered around military vehicles in a rural setting, likely during the Korean War era, as evidenced by their uniforms and the style of the trucks.
The image depicts a desolate urban landscape with dilapidated buildings and overgrown vegetation, indicative of a post-war or war-torn area.
The image depicts a serene village scene with traditional Korean houses and people engaged in various activities near a body of water, set against a backdrop of lush green hills.
A family is playing Jegichagi, a traditional Korean shuttlecock-kicking game, on a sunny day in a park.
A young boy dressed in traditional Korean attire is playfully kicking a blue jegi, a small paper-and-coin shuttlecock, into the air.
